    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    H

    handleCommand(String) - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.GameController
    Parses a raw textual command and executes the corresponding game action.
    handleEraChange(Era) - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.Game
    Updates the current era and applies the start-of-era building steps.
    handlePlayerCommand(String, String) - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.GameController
    Handles a command coming from a specific logged-in player.
    hasIcon() - Method in class it.polimi.Characters.Hunter
    Checks if this hunter possesses the special hunting icon.
    hasPassword() - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.GameRoom
    Checks if the room requires a password.
    heartbeat(String) - Method in interface it.polimi.Network.RMI.GameServiceRemote
    Marks activity for an already connected player.
    heartbeat(String) - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.RMI.RmiGameService
    Receives a heartbeat ping from the client, updating its last activity timestamp.
    hide - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.Constants.InventorIcon
    Hide icon.
    hook - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.Constants.InventorIcon
    Hook icon.
    Hunter - Class in it.polimi.Characters
    Represents a Hunter character in the game.
    Hunter(Era, int, boolean) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Characters.Hunter
    Constructs a Hunter character with the specified properties.
    HUNTER - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.Constants.CharacterType
    Specialized in hunting icons and food supply.
    Hunting - Class in it.polimi.Events
    Represents a Hunting event in the game Mesos.
    Hunting(Era, Position, int, int) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Events.Hunting
    Constructs a Hunting event with specified era, position, and reward values.
    HUNTING - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.Constants.EventType
    Event related to food production and resource gathering.
